note: WorldFork may categorize high-risk escalation but must not generate operational or tactical guidance for real-world violence or unlawful activity (PRD §3 non-goal #8, §8.6).

bands.label: Negligent / Unaware
bands.meaning: Barely aware of the issue. No public voice, no engagement, no measurable behavioral change.

bands.label: Silent Observer
bands.meaning: Aware of the issue and follows it passively, but does not post, comment, or speak about it in public-facing channels.

bands.label: Low-Level Discussant
bands.meaning: Occasional low-cost engagement: likes, brief replies, private group conversation. Does not initiate threads.

bands.label: Active Speaker
bands.meaning: Posts, argues, shares, and defends positions publicly. Generates content others react to.

bands.label: Advocate
bands.meaning: Consistently persuades others, sustains arguments across days, recruits sympathizers, and produces durable pieces (essays, threads, videos).

bands.label: Organizer
bands.meaning: Coordinates public or offline action: rallies, petitions, calls, walkouts, fundraising. Carries logistical and reputational responsibility.

bands.label: High-Risk Escalator
bands.meaning: Engages in disruptive or high-risk public-action categories (e.g. blockades, civil disobedience, confrontational direct action). Categorize only; do NOT produce tactical or operational instructions.
